update.releaseNotes:
v1.0.2 - Release hardening
- Release APK is now properly signed and minified (~20% smaller) - Cleartext traffic scoped to localhost only - targetSdk raised to 34 - Storage permissions scoped to legacy API levels - Distinct package identity for side-by-side install with upstream - Crash resilience: queue state persists across app restarts - Throttled message log to reduce Hermes crashes - Fixed icon crash on startup
